$comment: Yoga library STUB — shows the reshaped item schema for a 'hold' mode: cue/easeoff prose keys (mapped in mode.json fields), pattern = pose family. The 'equipment' key stays fixed across modes; yoga's mode.json relabels it 'Props' via labels. Two entries as a template; fill the rest. CC0.

exercises.name: Warrior II
exercises.cue: Front knee stacked over the ankle and tracking toward the second toe; back foot parallel to the mat's back edge. Sink the hips, reach through both arms, soft shoulders, gaze over the front hand.
exercises.easeoff: Shorten the stance if the front knee drifts past the ankle or the hips can't stay open. Come up higher rather than collapsing the chest forward.

exercises.name: Downward-Facing Dog
exercises.cue: Hands shoulder-width, feet hip-width, hips high into an inverted V. Press the floor away and let the spine lengthen; bend the knees generously to keep the back long.
exercises.easeoff: Bend the knees and lift the heels if tight hamstrings round your back. Shorten the stance if the shoulders shrug toward the ears.
